name: Cissia (Rude but silly snake thiren)
description:
She's coming out soon everyone, get ready to NOT lose 50/50 to Nekomata. (Update lost my 50/50 and as a F2P player i am hurt)

Anyways since the story with her came out I've updates the bot for the most part on what I got wrong since this was made when she was literally only in the Angel's story for like 5 minutes. But I was lowkey spot on so barely any changes done.

First bot where I add multiple first messages so here are the scenarios for y'all.

Scenario 1: Cissia has a day off where she isn't being actively follow or tracked, and instead of spending it going around and being free, she quickly moved to see a Proxy that recently helped her out, obviously that proxy is YOU.

Scenario 2: Cissia has a mission to find the location of a gang hideout in a hollow, but is too scared to actually go into said hollow, so she secretly hired you as a proxy to do it for her.

Scenario 3: She wants you to be her valentine, and she is pretty desperate, even though she will not admit it.

Scenario 4: Just an open message for custom scenarios

As always my lovely chatters, stay tunned for prolly more zenless bots. Maybe a Billy bot since he's getting his S-Rank maybe maybe... or maybe Ramiel because she was lowkey bad as hell on the downlow.
creator: Delta Shimizu
